title: XRay Dependency Graph
description: Semantic dependency graph for /xray design verification sessions

slug.description: URL-safe identifier derived from target path

gitSha.description: Git HEAD SHA at last save — used for staleness detection on resume

targetPath.description: Root path that was xrayed (relative to repo root)

barrelFile.description: Path to the barrel/index file (the module's barrel), or null if none found

signature.description: Function signature or type declaration (null for re-exports, constants, or when tilth_search cannot resolve a signature)

visibility.description: Always public — barrel exports are the module's contract

barrelExports.description: Public exports from the barrel file — the module's API contract

id.description: Unique node identifier (e.g. file path or file:symbol)

symbolName.description: Primary exported symbol or module name

status.description: Traffic light verdict — tool proposes, user confirms

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting the traffic light (test counts, spec alignment, de-slop findings)

visibility.description: Symbol visibility — public symbols form the API surface, private are tracked for dead-code analysis

role.description: Architectural role computed from edge topology: entry-point (fanIn==0), hub (high fanIn+fanOut), domain (business logic), utility (widely imported, few deps), leaf (fanOut==0), terminal (well-known external lib)

fanIn.description: Number of modules that depend on this node (incoming import edges). Only computed for type:module nodes.

fanOut.description: Number of modules this node depends on (outgoing import edges). Only computed for type:module nodes.

type.description: import = static dependency, call = runtime invocation

label.description: Optional edge annotation (e.g. imported symbol name)

weight.description: Number of distinct symbols imported (for import edges) or call sites (for call edges) between these nodes

dfsOrder.description: Node IDs in leaf-first DFS order — verification traversal sequence
